task_description:
为我设计并输出一张现代化的 app 登录界面设计图，包括登录表单、输入框、登录按钮、忘记密码链接、注册链接等元素。设计风格要现代、美观、用户友好。输出为 PNG 或 JPG 图片格式，保存到 ~/Desktop/ 目录。

【重要】保存文件时必须使用实际路径：/Users/lzz/Desktop，禁止用 /Users/xxx/ 或 $(whoami)。

params.code:
from PIL import Image, ImageDraw, ImageFont
import os

# 创建画布 - 现代手机尺寸 (430x860)
width, height = 430, 860
img = Image.new('RGB', (width, height), color='#f8f9fa')
draw = ImageDraw.Draw(img)

# 现代配色方案
color_primary = '#5b4edc'  # 深紫色
color_primary_light = '#7c6efd'  # 浅紫色
color_text_dark = '#1a1a1a'  # 深灰色
color_text_light = '#666666'  # 浅灰色
color_border = '#e0e0e0'  # 边框色
color_white = '#ffffff'  # 白色

# 绘制渐变效果背景（顶部渐变）
for y in range(180):
    r = int(91 + (248 - 91) * (y / 180))
    g = int(78 + (249 - 78) * (y / 180))
    b = int(220 + (250 - 220) * (y / 180))
    draw.rectangle([(0, y), (width, y+1)], fill=(r, g, b))

# 绘制标题区域背景
draw.rectangle([(0, 0), (width, 200)], fill=color_primary)

# 尝试加载系统字体，否则使用默认字体
try:
    font_title = ImageFont.truetype("/System/Library/Fonts/Helvetica.ttc", 32)
    font_label = ImageFont.truetype("/System/Library/Fonts/Helvetica.ttc", 14)
    font_text = ImageFont.truetype("/System/Library/Fonts/Helvetica.ttc", 13)
    font_link = ImageFont.truetype("/System/Library/Fonts/Helvetica.ttc", 12)
except:
    font_title = ImageFont.load_default()
    font_label = ImageFont.load_default()
    font_text = ImageFont.load_default()
    font_link = ImageFont.load_default()

# 绘制欢迎标题
title_text = "Welcome Back"
title_bbox = draw.textbbox((0, 0), title_text, font=font_title)
title_width = title_bbox[2] - title_bbox[0]
title_x = (width - title_width) // 2
draw.text((title_x, 60), title_text, fill=color_white, font=font_title)

# 绘制副标题
subtitle_text = "登录您的账户"
subtitle_bbox = draw.textbbox((0, 0), subtitle_text, font=font_label)
subtitle_width = subtitle_bbox[2] - subtitle_bbox[0]
subtitle_x = (width - subtitle_width) // 2
draw.text((subtitle_x, 110), subtitle_text, fill=color_white, font=font_label)

# 创建登录表单容器 - 白色圆角卡片效果
form_top = 160
form_left = 25
form_right = width - 25
form_bottom = 520

# 绘制表单背景（模拟圆角）
draw.rectangle(
    [(form_left, form_top), (form_right, form_bottom)],
    fill=color_white,
    outline=color_border,
    width=1
)

# 邮箱标签
draw.text((form_left + 20, form_top + 30), "邮箱或手机号", fill=color_text_dark, font=font_label)

# 邮箱输入框
input_box_y1 = form_top + 60
input_box_y2 = input_box_y1 + 45
draw.rectangle(
    [(form_left + 20, input_box_y1), (form_right - 20, input_box_y2)],
    fill='#f5f5f5',
    outline=color_border,
    width=1
)
draw.text((form_left + 30, input_box_y1 + 12), "user@example.com", fill=color_text_light, font=font_text)

# 密码标签
draw.text((form_left + 20, input_box_y2 + 25), "密码", fill=color_text_dark, font=font_label)

# 密码输入框
password_box_y1 = input_box_y2 + 55
password_box_y2 = password_box_y1 + 45
draw.rectangle(
    [(form_left + 20, password_box_y1), (form_right - 20, password_box_y2)],
    fill='#f5f5f5',
    outline=color_border,
    width=1
)
draw.text((form_left + 30, password_box_y1 + 12), "••••••••", fill=color_text_light, font=font_text)

# 忘记密码链接
forgot_text = "忘记密码？"
forgot_bbox = draw.textbbox((0, 0), forgot_text, font=font_link)
forgot_width = forgot_bbox[2] - forgot_bbox[0]
draw.text((form_right - 20 - forgot_width, password_box_y2 + 15), forgot_text, fill=color_primary, font=font_link)

# 登录按钮
button_y1 = password_box_y2 + 50
button_y2 = button_y1 + 50
draw.rectangle(
    [(form_left + 20, button_y1), (form_right - 20, button_y2)],
    fill=color_primary,
    outline=color_primary,
    width=1
)
login_text = "登录"
login_bbox = draw.textbbox((0, 0), login_text, font=font_title)
login_width = login_bbox[2] - login_bbox[0]
login_x = (width - login_width) // 2
draw.text((login_x, button_y1 + 10), login_text, fill=color_white, font=font_title)

# 注册链接和分隔符
register_area_y = form_bottom + 50
draw.text((form_left + 20, register_area_y), "还没有账户？", fill=color_text_light, font=font_text)
register_text = "立即注册"
register_bbox = draw.textbbox((0, 0), register_text, font=font_text)
register_width = register_bbox[2] - register_bbox[0]
draw.text((form_left + 155, register_area_y), register_text, fill=color_primary, font=font_text)

# 其他登录方式标题
other_login_y = register_area_y + 60
draw.text((form_left + 20, other_login_y), "其他登录方式", fill=color_text_dark, font=font_label)

# 社交登录按钮
button_size = 50
button_spacing = 20
buttons_start_x = form_left + 20
buttons_y = other_login_y + 40

# WeChat 按钮
draw.ellipse(
    [(buttons_start_x, buttons_y), (buttons_start_x + button_size, buttons_y + button_size)],
    fill='#09b83e',
    outline='#09b83e'
)
draw.text((buttons_start_x + 15, buttons_y + 15), "微", fill=color_white, font=font_label)

# Apple 按钮
apple_x = buttons_start_x + button_size + button_spacing
draw.ellipse(
    [(apple_x, buttons_y), (apple_x + button_size, buttons_y + button_size)],
    fill=color_text_dark,
    outline=color_text_dark
)
draw.text((apple_x + 15, buttons_y + 15), "苹", fill=color_white, font=font_label)

# Google 按钮
google_x = apple_x + button_size + button_spacing
draw.ellipse(
    [(google_x, buttons_y), (google_x + button_size, buttons_y + button_size)],
    fill='#ea4335',
    outline='#ea4335'
)
draw.text((google_x + 15, buttons_y + 15), "谷", fill=color_white, font=font_label)

# 保存图片
output_path = "/Users/lzz/Desktop/app_login_ui_design.png"
img.save(output_path, "PNG")
print(f"登录界面设计图已生成：{output_path}")
print(f"分辨率：{width}x{height} 像素")
print(f"包含元素：现代渐变背景、登录表单、输入框、登录按钮、忘记密码链接、注册链接、社交登录选项")

action_checkpoints.reasoning: 用户需要设计一张现代化的 app 登录界面。我是 Designer Duck（专项技能：ui_design, ux_review, prototype, style_guide），最高效的方案是使用 Python + PIL 直接生成设计图。将包含：现代化渐变背景、登录表单容器、邮箱/手机输入框、密码输入框、登录按钮、忘记密码链接、注册链接等元素。使用现代配色方案和排版，输出为 PNG 格式保存到 /Users/lzz/Desktop。
